metadata.description: Domo Magic ETL → dbt on Databricks migration skills.

plugins.name: domo-to-databricks-dbt
plugins.description: Migrate Domo Magic ETL dataflows to dbt on Databricks: ingest the export, transpile the tile DAG to Spark SQL CTEs, structure and test a dbt project, choose materializations, validate in tiers, and deploy as scheduled Databricks Jobs.
